headline: Teledyne FLIR Defense Wins $35+ Million Surveillance System Contract for Reconnaissance Vehicles
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., April 16, 2026--Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY) announced today that Teledyne FLIR Defense has been awarded a contract worth more than $35 million by WB Electronics S.A. (part of the WB Group) to equip reconnaissance vehicles with TacFLIR® 280-HDEP medium range multi-spectral surveillance systems.

headline: Teledyne Technologies to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Cards?
summary: TDY gears up for first-quarter 2026 earnings with acquisition-led growth and solid segment sales, and forecasts a 10.7% EPS rise but no clear signal of a beat.

headline: Teledyne FLIR Lands $35M Poland Deal To Equip Recon Vehicles With Advanced TacFLIR Surveillance Systems
summary: Delivery of TacFLIR 280-HDEP systems will provide advanced situational awareness, target identification, and other recon capabilitiesThird award this year for technology integration on armored vehicles in EuropeAgreement

headline: Teledyne: Deserving Of A Premium Valuation
summary: Teledyne (TDY) stock buy case: defense growth, contract wins, and M&A drive upside. Cash flow multiple implies a 12% upside vs. aerospace peers. See more here.
